title: grok-docs.yaml
description: Official JSON Schema for grok-docs.yaml — defines auto-generated documentation targets with section composition, style presets, and update triggers. Compatible with grok-install.yaml@1.0+ and grok@2026.4+.

version.description: Semantic version of this docs configuration file.

author.description: X handle of the docs config owner, prefixed with '@'.

compatibility.description: Platform specs this file is tested and compatible with.

docs.description: Named documentation target definitions. Each key is the target identifier used in '@grok docs <Name>' triggers.

target.description: Output file path relative to the repository root where the generated document is written.

sections.description: Ordered list of document sections to generate. Sections are composed top-to-bottom.

style.description: Writing style preset applied to the entire document.

update_on.description: Events that trigger an automatic re-generation of this document.

include_code_samples.description: Include fenced code examples in API reference and quickstart sections.

source_files.description: Glob patterns selecting source files Grok analyses to generate content. Defaults to entire repository.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the generated document output.

table_of_contents.description: Prepend an auto-generated table of contents to the document.

max_length_words.description: Soft word-count limit for the generated document. Grok will summarise sections to stay within budget.

enabled.description: Whether this doc target is active. Set to false to disable without removing the definition.
